libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: For native test execution of 5.0.1, ensure the generated build/test setup applies runtime system properties `-Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow` and `-Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true`; the existing 5.0.0 scaffold has these behind a 5.0.0-only guard, so extend/generalize that guard for 5.0.1 or Netty 4.2.x. Keep meaningful tests self-contained with a local Vert.x `HttpServer` on loopback; no external service environment is required.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: If generated tests choose optional features such as OAuth2-specific flows or POJO databind body codecs, they may introduce additional dependency needs, but those are not required for meaningful core Web Client coverage.
Local Gradle and Native Image verification remain authoritative for whether the Netty unsafe-access properties are sufficient on the exact JDK/native-image mode.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Vert.x Web Client 5.0.1 is self-contained for normal loopback HTTP-client coverage and needs no extra Maven dependency or Docker service, but it resolves Vert.x Core 5.0.1 with Netty 4.2.2.Final, so Java 25 native-image runs likely need the same Netty unsafe-access system properties already used for the 5.0.0 scaffold.
